message:
test(retry): add 7 LabRuntime cx-first retry tests

Cover the cx-first retry API surface that was untested after the
ambient-cx inheritance refactors (dcaa813d, f07cd0cf):

- with_retry_cx pre-cancelled returns Cancelled without invoking op
- with_retry_outcome_cx cancel after first attempt surfaces Cancelled
- with_retry_outcome_cx first-try success reports attempts=1
- with_retry_outcome_cx exhausts max_attempts and returns last error
- with_retry_and_circuit_cx open circuit returns CircuitOpen
- with_retry_and_circuit_cx pre-cancelled returns Cancelled
- with_smart_retry_cx pre-cancelled returns Cancelled

All 7 run under LabRuntime with seed-locked virtual time, proving
zero wall-clock dependence in the cx-aware retry paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
